text: I feel as though I am moving from the uncertain threshold of a quiet and clinical corridor into a realm designed for mental engagement and curiosity. The harsh angles and sterile light evoke a kind of existential anticipation—what might one discover just around the corner? Once inside, standing before the vibrant wall marked 'R+D,' I am invigorated. Here, ideas are alive and curiosity is rewarded. I sense the pulse of human creativity in the interplay of color, language, and innovation—a bold contrast to the liminality of the previous space. It’s as if I have moved from the void of possibility to the fullness of human endeavor.
